focus_points.label: How he's engaging with team rituals now.
focus_points.reason: Whether the dip in engagement since the promotion decision shows up in day-to-day participation, and what’s driving it—one possibility is unresolved disappointment, or it could be a normal adjustment after a setback.

focus_points.label: What feedback he actually heard from promotion.
focus_points.reason: Whether the promotion decision came with clear, actionable feedback—or if he only absorbed a verdict—so you can understand what he thinks he was told and what he wants to do next.

focus_points.label: Mentoring program as stretch or detour.
focus_points.reason: What the mentoring is doing for his core trajectory right now—healthy stretch that builds the next-level profile, or a redirect away from the work that would most move him forward.

focus_points.label: Concrete next path he believes exists.
focus_points.reason: What he sees as the realistic, concrete path forward after this moment, and whether his current priorities match that story.
